column1: What's up Riley its Spiffy with Spring Break U by Go Blue. saw you filled out a reservation on our website from the UofSC package. did you mean to do that or were you jus clicking around
What's up Madeline its Spiffy with Spring Break U by Go Blue. saw you filled out a reservation on our website from the UofSC package. did you mean to do that or were you jus clicking around
Yes I meant to do it, I am trying to get a couple other friends on board, but they're stilling figuring things out, but my reservation will probably go and pay by the 22nd
cool I got you will adjust it. how many people we thinkin total? we have 3 right now, you sarah and laura

Our reservation will stay the three of us, we're trying to get the other party to reserve their own, also do you happen to know if they're a lot of other uofsc students coming to the occidental Punta Cana that week too?
Yea I personally have a few other groups myself and theres other reps on the team that may have some
Y'all school has been coming in a lot lately
heyy Madeline whats up, just checkin in seeing how things are lookin on your end
Hi! My group is going forward with spring break u in Punta Cana occidental, I am looking at my account and getting ready to pay
Okay cool yea I just pulled it up. All looks good, did you still need 6 slots or more/less?

yea we can do 5 nights, want to?
yo Madeline! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
